ground_truth.title: Top digital marketing trends and predictions for 2026
ground_truth.author: Phil Wilson
ground_truth.main_content: Google experts share key 2026 predictions. Prepare for major shifts in AI, customer behaviours, and creative participation. The article explores how digital marketing will evolve in the coming year, featuring insights from Google's senior marketing research and insights managers, directors for search ads product strategy, and heads of YouTube culture and trends across Europe. Key themes include the continued rise of AI in marketing, changing customer behaviors, and new opportunities for creative participation in digital campaigns. Experts from Google France and sustainability directors provide regional perspectives on these global trends.
with: Google experts share key 2026 predictions. Prepare for major shifts in AI, customer behaviours, and creative participation.
Pablo Perez, Senior Marketing Research and Insights Manager at Google, provides insights on consumer trends.
Oliver Borm, Director for Search Ads Product Strategy in Europe, discusses the future of search advertising.
Roya Zeitoune, Head of YouTube Culture & Trends for Europe, shares perspectives on video marketing trends.
The article covers key digital marketing trends including AI advancements, customer behavior shifts, and creative participation opportunities.
